generated_oml:
instance AECOLivingLabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "AECO building infrastructure represented as a Digital Twin for a Living Lab case study, enabling real-time monitoring, simulation, and life cycle-encompassing optimization of building operations through unified virtual representations of physical assets."
]

instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors providing post-occupancy operational data for energy consumption metrics, integrated into BIM models for runtime data acquisition."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

instance VisualComfortSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors providing post-occupancy operational data for visual comfort metrics, integrated into BIM models for runtime data acquisition."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VisualComfortDataTransmitted
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectsSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors providing post-occupancy operational data for non-visual health effects metrics, integrated into BIM models for runtime data acquisition."
    DTDFVocab:producedData NonVisualHealthEffectsDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data transmitted via Eclipse Hono and Ditto protocols for bidirectional communication"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
]

instance VisualComfortDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data transmitted via Eclipse Hono and Ditto protocols for bidirectional communication"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VisualComfortSensor
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectsDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data transmitted via Eclipse Hono and Ditto protocols for bidirectional communication"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom NonVisualHealthEffectsSensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational data stream for energy consumption metrics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance VisualComfortData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational data stream for visual comfort metrics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VisualComfortDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational data stream for non-visual health effects metrics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData NonVisualHealthEffectsDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM models enriched with runtime metadata for devices (sensors, actuators, controllers)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMTools, ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance EclipseHonoConfig : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Middleware configuration for Eclipse Hono IoT connectivity"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance EclipseDittoConfig : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Middleware configuration for Eclipse Ditto digital twin management"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance BIMTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tools for modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMModelingService
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT connectivity"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsEnergyOptimization, PredictiveAnalyticsVisualComfort, PredictiveAnalyticsNonVisualHealthEffects
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management"
    DTDFVocab:enables FacilityManagementService, OperationalDecisionService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) for automated transformations from BIM to runtime artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelDrivenDeploymentService
]

instance EnergyConsumptionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time energy consumption monitoring insights"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionInsight, VisualComfortInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building operations for scenario analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsEnergyOptimization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsVisualComfort : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for visual comfort"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsNonVisualHealthEffects : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for non-visual health effects"
    DTDFVocab:provides NonVisualHealthEffectsInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance FacilityManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Modular service extensions for facility management"
    DTDFVocab:provides FacilityManagementInsight
]

instance OperationalDecisionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Modular service extensions for operational decision-making"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalPlanningInsight
]

instance ModelDrivenDeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [

    DTDFVocab:provides ReproducibilityInsight, ScalabilityInsight
]

]

]

]

    base:desc "Scenario analysis results from simulation"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of building operations"
]

instance FacilityManagementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights for facility management operations"
]

instance OperationalPlanningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights for operational planning decisions"
]

instance ReproducibilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Ensuring reproducibility through standardized transformation pipelines"
]

instance ScalabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Ensuring scalability through standardized transformation pipelines"
]

instance ParameterAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Parameter adjustments for building systems"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OperationalPlanningAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operational planning for facility management"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators within Building Control Systems (BCS) for controlling lighting"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators within Building Control Systems (BCS) for controlling HVAC"
]

instance OtherBuildingSystemsActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators within Building Control Systems (BCS) for controlling other building systems"
]

instance BIMModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "BIM modeling and editing capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:provides BIMModelingInsight
]

instance BIMModelingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from BIM modeling process"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals sent to Building Control Systems (BCS) through Eclipse Hono and Ditto for actuation of physical devices, including adaptive lighting adjustments and HVAC optimizations based on digital twin analytics."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data updates from physical sensors, enabling live synchronization between physical assets and digital twins for operational decision-making."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated integration of BIM models, Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange, Unreal Engine 5 for visualization, and modular service extensions within a unified framework for holistic building life cycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers all building life cycle stages: design, construction, operation, and refurbishment phases, with unified virtual representations enabling optimization across the complete asset lifecycle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to measure synchronization accuracy between physical and virtual representations, ensuring semantic coherence and interoperability."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT device connectivity and Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management, enabling bidirectional communication through standardized protocols for real-time data exchange."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "BIM standards (e.g., IFC), standardized extension points for service integration, and ODTE metric for interoperability assessment across heterogeneous systems."
]
